summary: Testing completed for NEW FEATURES: Random recipes ('Cosa cuciniamo oggi?'), AI recipe generation with Gemini 2.5 Flash, search, and edit functionality. Backend: Random recipes endpoint working (3/3 tests passed). AI generation working correctly - generates complete Italian recipes with ingredients and steps in ~10 seconds. Frontend: All new UI features working - random recipe section displays correctly, AI generation button present, generated recipes display properly, edit modal functional.

minor.issue: One recipe has persistent error status from previous failed AI generation attempt (connection error to LLM service). This is intermittent and not a code issue.
minor.note: Subsequent AI generation attempts on other recipes work correctly. Retry button available for users.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.note: Minor deprecation warning from React Native, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: GET /api/recipes/random endpoint implemented correctly with MongoDB $sample aggregation
✓ Backend: POST /api/recipes/{id}/generate-recipe endpoint working (NOT /transcribe as in old version)
✓ Backend: AI uses Gemini 2.5 Flash via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
✓ Backend: AI generates complete Italian recipes even without caption (uses name + source_url as context)
✓ Backend: Proper async task creation for AI generation (asyncio.create_task)
✓ Backend: Recipe status properly updated (pending → done/error)
✓ Frontend: 'Cosa cuciniamo oggi?' section implemented with horizontal scroll
✓ Frontend: Random recipe cards display thumbnail, name, platform icon, and date
✓ Frontend: Search bar working with proper integration to backend
✓ Frontend: Recipe detail page has 'Genera Ricetta con AI' button with testID='transcribe-btn'
✓ Frontend: Polling logic implemented (checks status every 3 seconds)
✓ Frontend: AI-generated recipe displays with proper formatting
✓ Frontend: Error state shows error message with 'Riprova' (Retry) button
✓ Frontend: Edit modal works for name/caption/notes with proper testIDs
✓ Frontend: AI badge shows on recipe cards when transcription_status is 'done'

success_rate.backend: 100% for new features (random recipes: 3/3, search: 1/1, update: 1/1). AI generation: working correctly (verified manually with successful generation)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features working: random recipes section, AI generation button, AI content display, edit modal)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing TEST_Tiramisu recipes. One recipe successfully generated AI content during testing (d859ec25-4455-4db5-b2d9-2a7b9d05c501).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW FEATURES tested and working. Profile name is 'TEST_Mario' (not 'marco' as mentioned in request - may have been changed). 2 TEST_Tiramisu recipes exist. AI recipe generation uses Gemini 2.5 Flash and generates complete Italian recipes with ingredients, steps, timing, and tips. One recipe has error status from previous failed attempt but retry functionality works. Random recipes endpoint returns up to 3 random recipes using MongoDB $sample.

new_backend_endpoints: GET /api/recipes/random?count=3 - Returns random recipes for 'Cosa cuciniamo oggi?' section ✓
POST /api/recipes/{id}/generate-recipe - Triggers AI recipe generation with Gemini 2.5 Flash ✓
AI generation completes in ~10 seconds and sets transcription_status to 'done' ✓
Generated recipe contains Italian content with INGREDIENTI, PROCEDIMENTO, TEMPO, PORZIONI, CONSIGLI ✓
new_frontend_features: 'Cosa cuciniamo oggi?' section on home page with random recipe cards ✓
Random recipe cards show thumbnail/placeholder, name, platform icon, date ✓
Random recipe cards are clickable and navigate to detail page ✓
Search bar on home page (already existed, verified working) ✓
Drawer navigation with hamburger menu (already existed, verified working) ✓
Recipe detail page has 'Genera Ricetta con AI' button ✓
Recipe detail page shows loading state during AI generation ✓
Recipe detail page displays generated recipe when status is 'done' ✓
Recipe detail page shows error with 'Riprova' button when status is 'error' ✓
Edit modal works for name/caption/notes (already existed, verified working) ✓
AI badge shows on recipe cards in list when transcription_status is 'done' ✓

ai_generation_test.verification: PASSED - Complete Italian recipe generated successfully

performance_notes: Backend responds quickly. Random recipes endpoint uses MongoDB $sample for efficient random selection. AI generation takes ~10 seconds (acceptable for LLM generation). Frontend loads smoothly. Polling every 3 seconds is reasonable. No performance issues detected.
security_notes: No authentication required as per requirements. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY properly stored in environment variables. No sensitive data exposed in responses.

mobile_design_review.random_section: Horizontal scroll with 140px wide cards, proper spacing (12px gap)
mobile_design_review.random_cards: Thumbnail 140x100, proper touch targets, platform icon and date visible
mobile_design_review.ai_button: Prominent purple button (#6C3DC1) with sparkles icon, easy to tap
mobile_design_review.ai_content: Properly formatted with line breaks, readable font size (14px), good contrast
mobile_design_review.edit_modal: Full-screen modal with proper keyboard handling, all inputs accessible
mobile_design_review.overall: Mobile-first design maintained, all new features follow existing design patterns
